proof: IVX AI Chat — loading removal + open-on-latest scroll fix

changes.watchdogBanner: In-progress / 'IVX AI WORKING' banner is now suppressed. Only terminal BLOCKED/DEGRADED states surface.
changes.liveWorkPanel: Active 'IVX is working...' View/Watchdog/Copy log/Dismiss panel removed from the composer. Idle Live Work entry remains.
changes.composerHint: Composer hint is now static 'Assistant ready.' — never 'Message sent. Reply will appear when ready.' or other loading text.
changes.scrollBehavior: FlatList now uses initialScrollIndex to the last message, with a single deterministic scroll fallback instead of repeated retries that caused jumping.
changes.loadingStages: Removed unused ActivityIndicator, aiExecutionStage, aiWorkingMessage, formatAIExecutionStage code paths.

ownerAIChat.answer: Grounded Casa Rosario investment summary (Pembroke Pines FL, $1.4M, 30% ROI, 14-24 months, $50 min)

publicChat.answer: Investor-facing Casa Rosario summary with risk flags
